tracks.title: Cubic Waveform
tracks.description: Audio stems from a mess around with Mazetools Mutant, The Video from The Melbourne NYE Laser and Fireworks show from GLT's youtube capture, remixed into resolume and wire and me spending the weekend trying to get my computer to do AV stuff again after being dormant for too long....

tracks.title: Untitled Organic Granular Experiment #1768089600
tracks.description: Love a good organ sample... Didn't do a weeklyvid this week though, Kinda left it to the last minute So this is just having a jam before bed, the night before deadline ... classic Something to help me sleep

tracks.title: Late Calibration Test (Late Submission)
tracks.description: Sorry, It's late but.... (Disclaimer, I used a late upload link because I missed the deadline.... too much overtime, were only human) It's me reinstalling computers, replacing disks etc It's only a minute, so personally i consider this a warm up track for those weeks where my time is overwealmed..... See you in week 4 for yet another time-stretched-goal I hope to do Weeklyvids at least once a month, but one track a week ...

tracks.title: Anxious Goth Rabbit
tracks.description: About 4-hours worth of time spent on it. Was kinda going for a happy-derpy rabbit but then got frustrated, and the rabbit turned goth.

tracks.title: Desktop\pixitracker_1bit\2016-02-01 09-44.piximod
tracks.description: *shrugs* Post FX in audacity Should have started earlier but it's been a busy week.. Sus out http://www.warmplace.ru/soft/pixitracker/ (I used 1bit)

tracks.title: EpochJam (PixiTracker)
tracks.description: With >40 degree days and an on going heatwave in Melbourne, and needing a new pair of headphones (I think I've lost my good ones) - I've decided to go with a nuclear option. So here's a PixiTracker jam track! Cool application by Alexander Zolotov (A.K.A Nightradio) from warmplace.ru Check it -- http://www.warmplace.ru/soft/pixitracker/ Also available on Android (most nightradio software run on multiple platforms) (may run on your toaster!) Yep, Built this simple track in about 2 hours. No post FX on this one, just a simple native jam... because nuclear, because weeklybeats. The video output is also native from the PixiTracker software. / no post fx. Link to piximod file Next week is a colab with Hungee Funk ... My first Weeklybeats Colab for the year! - exciting
